title: The Aquatic Basin
lines: The path opens into a wide, neon-blue aquatic basin. Bioluminescent lily pads float on the surface, casting a gentle, cerulean light across the concrete path.
A group of capybaras rests by the water. They are semi-transparent and ethereal, their internal skeletons glowing with a faint, blueprint-style blue light.
They seem completely indifferent to the apocalypse, grazing on glowing algae with a peaceful, mechanical rhythm.

options.desc: 1. Stay a while and watch the peaceful creatures
2. Return to the main zoo path
